specialNeed.popup: 5% discount on all our tour packages for guests requiring accessibility assistance, supporting inclusive travel experiences.
specialNeed.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop your files here or click to select
specialNeed.first: At Sun Pyramids Tours, we believe that travel should be a joyful and inclusive experience for everyone.

second.title: Why We’re Doing This:
second.one: To ensure that families, friends, and companions can share the same joy of discovery—together.
second.two: To honor the strength, resilience, and inspiring spirit of our valued travelers.
second.three: To reaffirm our commitment to care, respect, and truly unforgettable experiences.

specialNeed.third: The discount applies to the entire package, benefiting travelers requiring accessibility support as well as their companions.
specialNeed.fourth: Sun Pyramids Tours – We Care, because travel is for everyone.

five.title: We are proud to introduce a new initiative:
five.paragraph: A fixed 5% discount on all tour packages that include travelers requiring accessibility support and their companions.

specialNeed.sixth: Choose the accessible package that suits your needs, upload your medical or disability card for verification, and enjoy up to 5% off your experience.

thankful.title: Thankful Page
thankful.three: Your details have been successfully submitted and confirmed.
thankful.four: Our team will reach out to you within 1 hour via WhatsApp, phone call, or email to provide all the details you need.
thankful.five: Get ready — your adventure with Sun Pyramids Tours starts here!

sunpyramids.aboutOne: Established in 1970 with a tourism license (No. 92 – Class A) from the Egyptian Ministry of Tourism.
sunpyramids.aboutTwo: One of the first tourism companies in Egypt, boasting over 50 years of experience in the travel industry.
sunpyramids.aboutThree: Specializes in organizing individual tours, group trips, incentive programs, study trips, and religious journeys.

where.overall: Our customers are from all over the world

distination.aboutOne: provides services all across Egypt, including Cairo, Aswan, Luxor, Alexandria, the Red Sea, and the Sinai Peninsula.
distination.aboutTwo: The company offers Nile cruises from Aswan to Luxor, desert trips, and airport transfers.
distination.aboutThree: Offices are located in all major destinations to ensure on-ground support.

partnership.two: Complete planning: transport, stays, and city tours

certfication.info: At Sun Pyramids Tours, we’re dedicated to sustainable travel and proud to be Travelife certified, meeting international standards for responsible tourism. By choosing us, you support a greener, ethical way to explore the world. Join us in shaping a sustainable future! Explore responsibly and check out our Privacy, Sustainability, and Responsible Travel policies.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph: Create outstanding, client-focused travel experiences with a commitment to sustainability. We strive to reduce our environmental impact and support local communities, setting new standards for responsible tourism.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.paragraph: We aim to be essential to our customers by offering quality tours at affordable prices. Our focus on customer satisfaction, and innovation drives our leadership in the travel industry.

ceo.one: Welcome to Sun Pyramids Tours! Our dedicated team of travel experts, with over 20 years of experience, is here to ensure your journey is both delightful and memorable.
ceo.two: Since our beginnings in 1970, we have grown into one of Egypt's leading travel companies, driven by our passion for excellence and customer satisfaction. With extensive experience in destinations worldwide, we are committed to exceeding your expectations and providing exceptional service tailored to your needs.
ceo.three: Thank you for choosing us to fulfill your travel dreams. We look forward to working with you and ensuring your experience with Sun Pyramids Tours is seamless and enjoyable.

contactus.hero: Call Us, Write Us, Or Knock on Our Door
